blue_oceans.notes: 7.2M ADHD/parenting community. 'The ADHD Advantage' sold 300K+ copies. 'Driven to Distraction' (Hallowell & Ratey) has sold 1M+ copies over 30 years. Russell Barkley's YouTube channel has 800K subscribers — his 30-year research summary lectures consistently get 2M+ views. The ADHD parenting space has zero daily education streak apps despite being one of the most-searched parenting topics. Gap: one...

6.1M parenting community where food/feeding is a top-5 concern. 'French Kids Eat Everything' sold 400K+ copies creating a cultural conversation about feeding culture. The solid starts Instagram has 2M+ followers. 'It's Not About the Broccoli' and 'Helping Your Child with Extreme Picky Eating' each sold 200K+ copies. 6.1M parenting community. 'The Whole-Brain Child' (Siegel & Bryson) sold 2M+ copies and created an entire parenting genre around brain science. 'Brain Rules for Baby' (Medina) and 'NurtureShock' (Bronson & Merryman) both sold 500K+ copies — proven massive appetite for the neuroscience behind child development. Gap: one child development science concept per day (what serve-and-return interaction is...

5.8M digital parenting community. 'iGen' (Jean Twenge) sold 400K+ copies launching the cultural conversation about smartphones and teen mental health. 'The Anxious Generation' (Jonathan Haidt, 2024) became an immediate bestseller reaching #1 in multiple categories with 1M+ copies sold in its first year — the largest cultural moment in parenting since 'The Coddling of the American Mind'. 5.7M parenting/psychology community. 'The Body Keeps the Score' (van der Kolk) spent 200+ weeks on the NYT bestseller list with 3M+ copies sold — the single largest validated appetite for trauma and child psychology science in publishing history. 'Parenting from the Inside Out' (Siegel & Hartzell) sold 500K+ copies. The ACE study has been downloaded 1M+ times from the CDC website. Gap: one child p...

5.6M parenting/gentle parenting community. 'How to Talk So Kids Will Listen' (Faber & Mazlish) has sold 5M+ copies since 1980 — the evergreen proof of demand for communication-based parenting science. 'The Whole-Brain Child' and 'No-Drama Discipline' (Siegel & Bryson) collectively sold 3M+ copies. 'Positive Discipline' (Jane Nelsen) sold 6M+ copies across its series. Gap: one positive parenting sc...

1.05M child sleep community plus 5.2M r/Parenting where sleep is the #1 discussed topic. 'Precious Little Sleep' and 'The Happy Sleeper' each sold 300K+ copies. Taking Cara Babies course has sold to 2M+ families at $69-149 per course — $150M+ in educational product sales for sleep coaching alone. Yet no app teaches the daily science of why babies sleep the way they do. Gap: one child sleep science...

545K Montessori/child-led learning community. Montessori book market is booming: 'The Montessori Toddler' (Simone Davies) has sold 700K+ copies and spawned a franchise (Montessori Baby, Montessori Child). The Montessori hashtag has 4B+ TikTok views. Yet no app exists to teach the daily philosophy and science behind why Montessori works. Gap: one Montessori science concept per day (what the absorbe...

390K direct community + 5.2M r/Parenting where reading is among the most-discussed anxieties. The science of reading movement has become a national controversy with 30+ states passing phonics legislation — massive cultural awareness moment with zero education habit to capitalize on it. 335K direct homeschool community plus 5.2M r/Parenting where homeschool is a high-growth topic (homeschool enrollment grew from 3.3% to 11.1% of school-age children from 2016-2024 per NCES data). 'The Well-Trained Mind' (Wise & Bauer) has sold 500K+ copies across editions, making it the bestselling homeschool curriculum guide ever written.
